steps.t: Tangwen has asked you to bring her flower heads from the fields around Herne and lavender from her garden in Herne. Herne is in western Cardolan.
You should bring the hawkwort flowers and lavender to Tangwen. Tangwen is in Herne, in western Cardolan.
Tangwen has asked you to add the herbs to the teapot to create a relaxing tea of the people of Herne. The teapot is on the table next to Tangwen, in H…
You have helped Tangwen make a herbal tea, and now she is waiting to speak with you. Tangwen is in Herne in Cardolan.
